text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, Nishino Flower goes on a talk show titled Speaking of That Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a big event held at a large venue every year.
Nishino Flower is not their only guest, though.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I looove talking! I've been looking forward to this
event for sooo long!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
How 'bout you, Taishin?! I bet you've been
super-duper excited too, right, Taishin?!
Taishiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you ever stop talking?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's Narita Taishin, the winner of the Satsuki
Sho, and Winning Ticket, the victor of the
Japanese Derby! And that's not even it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My name is Biwa Hayahide. I'm looking forward to
speaking with you all today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Brian! Greet the audience properly!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hey.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
There's Biwa Hayahide, who shared the Triple
Crown with them, and her younger sister, Narita
Brian, who won the Asahi Hai F.S.!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
This is incredible! I wonder what they're gonna
talk about today? I'm so glad I won tickets!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've been invited as a guest to an event Hayahide
and the others will be attending as well?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I don't know if I'll be able to even talk
properly at such a big event...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Fans look forward to it every year, and I heard it's
really tough to get tickets.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: If I mess up, everyone will be disappointed...
choice_data_list: If you start feeling anxious, just look at me.
If you start feeling anxious, just look at me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: You can just pretend you're talking to me.
You can just pretend you're talking to me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That's right! You'll be there with me.
choice_data_list:
You're an amazing Umamusume. Hold your head
up high!

You're an amazing Umamusume. Hold your head
up high!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Next up is Nishino Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: H-hello, everyone. I'm Nishino Flower.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Hello! Thank you so much for coming on the show
today.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
You started your career with the Hanshin Juvenile
Fillies and the Oka Sho, then went on to make
consecutive wins in the Milers Cup, Yasuda
Kinen, and even the Mile Championship!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Even only looking at the major races, you've won
so many titles already!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Oooooh!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! Um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I... I did my best!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: You're the best, Flower! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for having me here. I hope we can all
have a great time talking today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew! My heart was racing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower carries on flawlessly in the talk
show, and the event is a huge success thanks to
her efforts.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I heard you cheering for me in the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And when I did, I remembered to have confidence
in myself. That gave me the courage to hold my
head up high!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Indeed, you were fantastic.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You handled that interview well, and with all your
usual earnestness and grace. Allow me to
congratulate you on a job well done, as well as
thank you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? You want to thank me?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The event went smoothly thanks to you
effortlessly carrying the conversation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Consider the other guests from today. Ticket is
unpredictable, and Taishin isn't the most
proactive conversationalist.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, Brian is awkward and taciturn. Even
before the show started, I worried if we'd be able
to carry a conversation at all.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your laughter made smiles bloom, and you did
your best to engage in every topic. You paid such
careful attention to the other guests too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, even Taishin and Brian did their
best to answer earnestly whenever you turned the
conversation to them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket's a simple soul. Just being exposed to your
calm demeanor kept her similarly serene from
start to finish.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We owe it to you for the grand success of the
event, so thank you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, it's an honor to be considered
equal to a great Umamusume such as you, who
has accomplished so much.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll continue to show your greatness to
the next generation.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I will! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Hayahide was so generous with her
compliments.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I was able to hold my head up high
today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Told me what?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That's right, I am! Wait, that's not quite correct.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: We're both amazing. ♪
